items.name_en: 💰Black with Silver Buckle Oil Wax Leather · 28cm
items.name_cn:
💰Black with Silver Buckle Oil Wax Leather · 28cm
Niki's design is inspired by YSL's classic tuxedo, with a cool and casual overall style. The bag is made of oil wax calfskin, with natural wrinkled texture that exudes a vintage feel and is durable! The iconic metal logo has a vintage distressed texture, low-key and premium, as if silently telling the brand's fashion attitude!
Size: 28×20×8cm
Model: 633158

items.name_cn:
💰Dior Oblique #
Every big brand has a square bag in the spotlight, and this year DioraddictBag is the one.
The metal is in a vintage patina style, and the designer infuses her feminism into every piece.
Rigid canvas, whether the clean and sharp blue-black or the artistic burgundy,
It reflects the image of every independent woman today.
As for the strap, this comes with an antique gold chain by default
I recommend pairing it with a vintage shoulder strap, worn crossbody at chest or waist level
It instantly elongates your proportions.
Works with winter coats and hoodies, summer t-shirts and skirts, it's a universal match!
Size: 24cm (Only Medium size available)

items.name_cn:
💰Dior saddle Oblique woc
Classic vintage canvas is truly a love at first sight
This Woc is more square than the mini version
Comes with card slots, zipper, and compartments
Fits a phone and lipstick, good capacity
Because of the exquisite and elegant shape, the sides are a bit slimmer
⛓️Chain length is about 120cm
Can be adjusted to your preference
The bag is lightweight, the thin chain reduces the weight
The Oblique pattern is very stylish
It creates a great look effortlessly ⌫⌫
The more you look, the more you like it ☺︎☺︎☺︎
Size: 22*14.5*4.5 cm

items.name_en: 💰Highest market version (original sample quality) authentic prototype
items.name_cn:
💰Highest market version (original sample quality) authentic prototype
[Guaranteed imported top-grain cowhide, no split leather, no microfiber]
Saddle Long Wallet with Zipper
Black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide
Number: 2ADBC315YKK_H00N
This saddle long wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted with black hand-stitched inlaid grain cowhide, featuring contrasting topstitching, it reinterprets the classic saddle silhouette, featuring a metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo on the front for a touch of class. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double-layer cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage space. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal companion for daily use.
Main material: Cowhide
Lining: Cowhide, Technical fabric
Internal zip pocket
12 card slots
Double-layer cash compartment
Front features metal-plated copper alloy Dior logo
Interior features Dior embossed logo
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 19.8 x 11 cm (Length x Height)
Fits bank cards

items.name_en: 💰In stock Kelly Elan Goat Leather Black Gold/Silver Hardware Latest Kelly Elan Bestseller 🆕 Hand-waxed thread stitching
items.name_cn:
💰In stock Kelly Elan Goat Leather Black Gold/Silver Hardware Latest Kelly Elan Bestseller 🆕 Hand-waxed thread stitching
New member of the Kelly family Kelly Elan Size 27+ Replaces the first generation crossbody bag Upon seeing it in person, it feels like an enlarged Kelly To Go. Kelly Elan and Kelly 28 have similar bottom lengths. The bag's thickness is similar to the second generation. Large capacity. The shoulder strap is detachable but not adjustable in length. However, it is easy to carry regardless of height. Detach the strap to instantly turn it into a handbag. A bit like the Kelly Cut. In short, it is very beautiful.
💘💘Love it Love it Recommended
